entries.title: COMMENTARY ON THE APOCALYPSE 21:7 on revelation 21:7
entries.excerpt: He who conquers in the war against the invisible demons will receive these good things, becoming a son of God and reveling in the good gifts of the Father.

entries.title: Commentary on revelation 21:7
entries.excerpt: Let those who are hungry come, that being fed with heavenly food, they may lay aside their lasting hunger; let those who are athirst come, that they may with full mouth draw forth the water of salvation from an ever-flowing fountain.

entries.title: Commentary on Revelation on revelation 21:7
entries.excerpt: The one who conquers, he says, will inherit both the passions and the evil beast, the Devil; will inherit these things. Therefore, the one who conquers.
